candidate_actions.description: Write a non-secret summary such as {"lanes":["chatgptrest"],"source":"hermes_home_config_summary","secret_policy":"omitted"} into agent.mcp_config.
candidate_actions.reason: The Multica field name mcp_config is intended for executable MCP configuration. Using it as metadata summary may pollute field semantics and could be passed to backends that expect full MCP config.

candidate_actions.description: Write an actual executable MCP config into agent.mcp_config.
candidate_actions.reason: This may alter tool access and can contain endpoint or credential references. It requires independent review, a secret-safe config contract, and rollback.

candidate_actions.description: Change the checker/manifest to explicitly accept Hermes local config allowlist as the control-plane source for Hermes MCP lanes while Multica mcp_config stays null.
candidate_actions.reason: This weakens the prior requirement that Multica-visible metadata be the source of truth. It may be correct for Hermes specifically, but it changes the control-plane contract.

candidate_actions.description: Create a restrictive workspace skill that only states chief control-plane boundaries, then assign it to hermes-chief-of-staff.
candidate_actions.reason: Even restrictive skill assignment is live prompt/behavior mutation for the chief agent. It should not be used to clear the drift gate under Grade-C fallback alone.

candidate_actions.description: Create workspace skill records from /vol1/1000/projects/planning/hermes-skills/hermes-workbench and planning-openmind-bridge, then assign them to chief.
candidate_actions.reason: This changes chief available skill context and may route planning/workbench behavior. It needs content review, allowlist, and independent gate.

candidate_actions.description: Keep live state unchanged, preserve no-op dry-run, attach this proposal to AOP-79, and wait for independent Pro/GAC decision before any live reconciliation.
candidate_actions.reason: This preserves the current safety boundary while making the next mutation reviewable.

agent_mcp_config.reason: No secret-safe executable MCP config contract has been approved. Metadata summaries should not be stored in mcp_config without independent approval.

workspace_skills.name: chief-control-plane-boundary
workspace_skills.intended_effect: Restrict chief to manifest/policy/checker-driven governance behavior.

agent_skill_assignment.reason: No workspace skill has been created or independently approved.

required_before_live_change: Independent GAC/Claude gate recovered or equivalent user-approved independent gate.
Decision on whether Hermes local config or Multica mcp_config is the source of truth for Hermes MCP lanes.
Secret-safe executable MCP config contract if agent.mcp_config will be used.
Workspace skill content review with hashes and rollback plan.
Dry-run expected result update approved before any self-advance is allowed.

current_decision.next_safe_action: attach proposal to AOP-79 and keep high drift blocked
